item.title: A Star's Heartbreaking End: Judith Barsi

media:content.media:title: A Star's Heartbreaking End: Judith Barsi
media:content.media:description: A Child Star's Heartbreaking End: Judith Barsi

item.title: He Picked the WRONG Victim to Mess With!
item.description: Gary, an absolute trooper! How he managed to stand strong for that long is just amazing! What are your thoughts on this absolutely crazy case?

media:content.media:title: He Picked the WRONG Victim to Mess With!
media:content.media:description: Gary, an absolute trooper! How he managed to stand strong for that long is just amazing! What are your thoughts on this absolutely crazy case?

item.title: Shanna Golyar Pretended To Be Cari Farver
item.description: In 2012, Nebraska mom Cari Farver vanished after dating David Krupa, then “Cari” began flooding him and Shanna Golyar with vicious texts, threats, and emails for years. There were vandalism attacks, a suspicious house fire, and even a shooting—until investigators uncovered the shocking truth: Cari had been murdered, and Shanna had been impersonating her to control David, frame others, and keep the chaos alive. How disturbing is it that a killer can “keep someone alive” online just to hide what they’ve done?

media:content.media:title: Shanna Golyar Pretended To Be Cari Farver
media:content.media:description: In 2012, Nebraska mom Cari Farver vanished after dating David Krupa, then “Cari” began flooding him and Shanna Golyar with vicious texts, threats, and emails for years. There were vandalism attacks, a suspicious house fire, and even a shooting—until investigators uncovered the shocking truth: Cari had been murdered, and Shanna had been impersonating her to control David, frame others, and keep the chaos alive. How disturbing is it that a killer can “keep someone alive” online just to hide what they’ve done?

item.title: They Took Care of Him & He Took Their Lives!
item.description: The details of this case? Absolutely chilling. I cannot even begin to imagine the horrors the witnesses experienced, with blood leaking out of that haunted suitcase. the contents of it revealing an even darker secret...

media:content.media:title: They Took Care of Him & He Took Their Lives!
media:content.media:description: The details of this case? Absolutely chilling. I cannot even begin to imagine the horrors the witnesses experienced, with blood leaking out of that haunted suitcase. the contents of it revealing an even darker secret...
